ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the vendor's website */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the vendor */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor operating at this location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location details (e.g., address) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the location (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_locations_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electronics" (
  "electronic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electronic category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic category (e.g., computers, monitors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the electronic category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the electronic item (e.g., computing, display) */,
  "recycling_process" TEXT /* Description of the recycling process for this category */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Description of the environmental impact of recycling this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("electronic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items_accepted" (
  "acceptance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acceptance record */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor accepting the item */,
  "electronic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electronic item being accepted */,
  "quantity_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity of items accepted per visit */,
  "condition_accepted" TEXT /* Condition of items accepted (e.g., working, non-working) */,
  "recycling_fees" TEXT /* Fees associated with recycling this item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceptance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_accepted_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_accepted_electronic_id FOREIGN KEY ("electronic_id") REFERENCES electronics ("electronic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_details" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational record */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "must_work" TEXT /* Whether the vendor accepts working items only */,
  "tax_deduction" TEXT /* Whether the vendor offers tax deduction for donations */,
  "data_protection_policy" TEXT /* Description of the data protection policy */,
  "security_measures" TEXT /* Description of security measures in place */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* JSON field to store certification statuses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_details_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pickup_services" (
  "pickup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pickup service record */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor offering the service */,
  "pickup_available" TEXT /* Whether the vendor offers pickup services */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee associated with the pickup service (if applicable) */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Service hours for pickup */,
  "service_areas" TEXT /* Service areas for pickup */,
  "appointment_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an appointment is required for pickup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pickup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pickup_services_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the note is about */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., operational, service, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, vendor, citizen) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service rated (e.g., recycling, pickup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_ratings_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term used */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date of the search */,
  "search_location" TEXT /* Location where the search was performed */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor holding the certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was obtained */,
  "certification_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Current status of the certification (e.g., valid, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_certifications_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Service hours for the service */,
  "service_areas" TEXT /* Service areas for the service */,
  "appointment_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an appointment is required for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_services_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor using the equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was acquired */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_equipment_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor using the facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was acquired */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_facilities_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the employee works for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_employees_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
